content.text: Piyumali Edirisinghe and the award record

Piyumali Edirisinghe is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Most Popular Actress of the Year. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Piyumali Edirisinghe, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

IMDb identifies Piyumali Edirisinghe as an actress known for Warsha, Neera, and Paata Kurullo. The GBE archive records her award as Most Popular Actress of the Year. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
